sourceList.title: Catherine Swynford Drury, "Find A Grave Index"
Legacy NFS Source: Catharine Swynford - Published information: NB.: This is NOT the Katherine Swynford (née Roelt) who became the mistress and third wife of John of Gaunt, but her granddaughter.;

zh.lifeSummary: 當Catharine Swynford於大約1405年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas Swynford39歲，母親Joan Crophill33歲。她於大約1418年與Sir William Drury在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年12月3日在英國享年74歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可盧加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catharine Swynford于大约1405年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Swynford39岁，母亲Joan Crophill33岁。她于大约1418年与Sir William Drury在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年12月3日在英国享年74岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可盧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Swynford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire, Kent): habitational name from Old Swinford (Worcestershire), Kingswinford (Staffordshire), Swinford (Leicestershire), Swinford in Cumnor (Berkshire), or Swinford in Hothfield (Kent), all of which are recorded Swineford or Swyneford in medieval documents. The placenames derive from Old English swīn ‘swine, pig’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Swineford
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one of the English places that gave rise to   Swinford  .
Americanized form of German Schweinfurt(h), a habitational name from a place so named (Franconia).

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Catharine Swynford was born about 1405, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Swynford, was 39 and her mother, Joan Crophill, was 33. She married Sir William Drury about 1418, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 3 December 1478, in England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Rougham, Suffolk, England.

fr.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catharine Swynford est née environ 1405, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Swynford, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan Crophill, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Drury environ 1418, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 décembre 1478, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Catharine Swynford um 1405 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Swynford 39 und ihre Mutter Joan Crophill 33. Sie hat um 1418 in Suffolk, England Sir William Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Dezember 1478 im Alter von 74 Jahren in England und wurde in Rougham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catharine Swynford è nata il circa 1405 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Swynford, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Joan Crophill, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Drury circa 1418, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 dicembre 1478, nel England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Rougham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catharine Swynfordが約1405年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Swynfordは39歳，母Joan Crophillは33歳であった。約1418年にイギリススフォルクでSir William Druryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年12月3日にイギリスで74歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクロウアムにて埋葬された。

ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Catharine Swynford(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Swynford(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Crophill(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1418년 영국 수폴크에서 Sir William Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 12월 3일 영국에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 루그함에 묻혔다.

pt.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catharine Swynford nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Swynford, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan Crophill, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Drury aproximadamente 1418, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1478, em Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catharine Swynford родилась около 1405 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Swynford было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Crophill, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Drury около 1418 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 декабря 1478 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catharine Swynford nació aproximadamente 1405, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Swynford, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan Crophill, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Sir William Drury aproximadamente 1418, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1478, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
